caption:
apply2uic October 24, 2023: "UIC is Chicago's only public university with an R1 research status in the Carnegie Classification of Institutions of Higher Education, with $509 million in research funding. Chancellor Miranda shared priority two—research infrastructure—to ensure our preeminent growth and development. 

____
Repost from @thisisuic 

#apply2uic #uicbound #collegesearch #takeactionnow #gouic #goflames".

caption:

Learn from 11 students' classroom, social, and college experiences! Witness the experience of a diverse, research public university. 

__

#uicbound #apply2uic #uiccampus #chicagopublicuniversity #uic #thecollegetouruic #collegesearch".

caption:
apply2uic October 5, 2023: "What is your favorite engineering program—and why is it computer science? The short answer: Well, duh! 

Our College of Engineering—ranked 73 out of the nation's top 100 for engineering schools— UIC's Computer Science program is 60th according to U.S. News & World Report. The college's student enrollment increased by 8.3%. With its promising internships (hey, Google!) and impressive research labs, it's no surprise this is one of Chicago's and the nation's top picks! 

Shoutout to @uicwiep 

Visit us for UIC Preview on Monday, October 9th, to learn more. 

#uic #gouic #apply2uic #uicengineering #womeninengineering #goflames #UICCampus #collegesearch #collegerankings #explorechicago 🗣🗣🗣".

caption:
apply2uic October 3, 2023: "Do rankings matter to you?—they're definitely a factor! We're growing in numbers and substance! Our Undergraduate Nursing program ranks 16th in the nation. And that's just one area of growth! The College of Nursing grew by 84 students, at a 5.4% increase. 

Visit the link in our bio to learn more about our college rankings by usnewsandworldreport

Check out The College Tour for interviews from current UIC students. Link in bio. 

#uic #goflames #campustour #publicuniversity #CollegeRankings".

caption:
apply2uic September 25, 2023: "It's up, and it's stuck! 🚀

UIC is ranked 16th in the nation for social mobility. This ranking category measures the extent schools enrolled and graduated students who receive federal Pell grants, which are given to students whose total family incomes are less than $50,000 annually. 

Learn more about new rankings by visiting our link in the bio! 

#illinoisuniversitychicago #publicuniversity #chicagoexplore #campustour #explorechicago #collegecampus #uic #gouic #goflames #uiccampus 
#chicagouniversity #collegerankings #collegesearch".

caption:
apply2uic September 21, 2023: "UIC is ranked 37th (tie) for campus ethnic diversity! ✨✨

How is this so? Not only are we committed to student ethnic diversity and inclusion, but also our staff's demographic. 

The Bridge to Faculty program, which focuses on transitioning underrepresented postdoctoral scholars of color into faculty roles, celebrated the newest cohort, marking 49 scholars with 31 already UIC professors per UIC Today. 

"Behind every number, there's a person with a name"! And, we're proud of every single one. 

#UIC #illinoisuniversitychicago #campusrankings #publicuniversity  #chicagoexplore
#collegecampus #gouic  #uiccampus #chicagouniversity #goflamesgo".

caption:
apply2uic May 18, 2023: "🗣Let 'em cook! No, really. 

UIC College of Nursing student Sarah Chang and UIC College of Medicine student Nirali Chauhan both take center stage to compete in "The Great British Bake Off" spinoff show "The Great American Baking Show"! Learn more about their journey to media's stage, how their friendship evolved from complete strangers and their experience since baking some of their treasured bites at UIC Today! Our talents are boundless.".

caption:
"Last Saturday hundreds of newly admitted Flames & their supports were fired up for our annual Ignite event. 🔥🔥

Featuring our 12 undergraduate colleges & countless student organizations, we celebrated our incoming class inside and out — no actually, the weather in Chicago was BEAUTIFUL! ☀️🌷

Swipe through ➡️ to discover some of our favorite moments and be sure to visit bound.uic.edu for more admitted student opportunities. #UICBound".

caption: "At the very least, UIC will do the most…for the common good. Lecture series like "The Embodied Inequality: Unpacking the Impact of Race & Racism on Health" highlight vast health disparities in our communities and explore how scholars and practitioners can proactively intervene. Leveling up the playing field one sector, one body at a time. You're bound for more. #UICBound".
